title: Louis XIV of France becomes King of France and Navarre
fact: Louis XIV was King of France from 14 May 1643 until his death in 1715.

title: Louis XVI of France becomes King of France and Navarre
fact: Louis XVI was the last king of France before the fall of the monarchy during the French Revolution.

title: Henry IV of France becomes king of France
fact: Henry IV, also known by the epithets Good King Henry or Henry the Great, was King of Navarre from 1572 and King of France from 1589 to 1610.

title: Louis XIII of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis XIII was King of France from 1610 until his death in 1643 and King of Navarre from 1610 to 1620, when the crown of Navarre was merged with the French crown.

title: Louis XVII of France becomes King of France and Navarre
fact: Louis XVII was the younger son of King Louis XVI of France and Queen Marie Antoinette.

title: Henry II of France becomes king of France
fact: Henry II was King of France from 1547 until his death in 1559.

title: Charles X of France becomes King of France and Navarre
fact: Charles X was King of France from 16 September 1824 until 2 August 1830.

title: Francis I of France becomes king of France
fact: Francis I was King of France from 1515 until his death in 1547.

title: Francis II of France becomes king of France
fact: Francis II was King of France from 1559 to 1560.

title: Charles VI of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles VI, nicknamed the Beloved and in the 19th century, the Mad, was King of France from 1380 until his death in 1422.

title: Henry III of France becomes king of France
fact: Henry III was King of France from 1574 until his assassination in 1589 and, as Henry of Valois, King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1573 to 1575.

title: Louis IX of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis IX, also known as Saint Louis, was King of France from 1226 until his death in 1270.

title: Charles VII of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles VII, called the Victorious or the Well-Served, was King of France from 1422 to his death in 1461.

title: Charles IX of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles IX was King of France from 1560 until his death in 1574.

title: Philip IV of France becomes king of France
fact: Philip IV, called Philip the Fair, was King of France from 1285 to 1314.

title: Philip II of France becomes king of France
fact: Philip II, also known as Philip Augustus, was King of France from 1180 to 1223.

title: Louis XII of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis XII, also known as Louis of Orléans, was King of France from 1498 to 1515 and King of Naples from 1501 to 1504.

title: Louis XI of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis XI, called "Louis the Prudent", was King of France from 1461 to 1483.

title: Charles VIII of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles VIII, called the Affable, was King of France from 1483 to his death in 1498.

title: John II of France becomes king of France
fact: John II, called John the Good, was King of France from 1350 until his death in 1364.

title: Charles V of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles V, called the Wise, was King of France from 1364 to his death in 1380.

title: Philip VI of France becomes king of France
fact: Philip VI, called the Fortunate, the Catholic and of Valois, was the first king of France from the House of Valois, reigning from 1328 until his death in 1350.

title: Louis VIII of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis VIII, nicknamed The Lion, was King of France from 1223 to 1226.

title: Philip III of France becomes king of France
fact: Philip III, called the Bold, was King of France from 1270 until his death in 1285.

title: Charles IV of France becomes king of France
fact: Charles IV, called the Fair in France and the Bald in Navarre, was the last king of the direct line of the House of Capet, King of France and King of Navarre from 1322 to 1328.

title: Louis X of France becomes king of France
fact: Louis X, known as the Quarrelsome, was King of France from 1314 and King of Navarre from 1305 until his death.

title: John I of France becomes king of France
fact: John I, called the Posthumous, was the King of France and Navarre, as the posthumous son and successor of Louis X, for the four days he lived in 1316.

title: Philip V of France becomes king of France
fact: Philip V, known as the Tall, was King of France and Navarre from 1316 to 1322.
